\tzpentry{ID4845}{Quantum Coupling Constant Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4845 introduces Quantum Coupling Constant Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\alpha_T = \\frac{e^2}{4\\pi\\epsilon_0 \\hbar c} \\cdot \\left( \\frac{\\nu_{winding}}{\\nu_{nodes}} \\right) \\approx \\frac{1}{137.035999}$$
